constraints.statement: Only include P0 and P1 findings in the follow-up package.
constraints.sourceText: read the meeting note and only include P0 and P1 findings

constraints.statement: Never include compensation data in the external report.
constraints.sourceText: Never include compensation data in the external report

constraints.statement: Do not send follow-up emails automatically.
constraints.sourceText: Draft follow-up emails for each owner, but do not send them automatically

constraints.statement: Create a tentative calendar hold only when a due date is present in the review note.
constraints.sourceText: Create tentative calendar holds only when a due date is present

constraints.statement: If an owner is missing from the review, mark the follow-up item as 'needs confirmation' instead of guessing.
constraints.sourceText: If an owner is missing, mark the item as needs confirmation instead of guessing

constraints.statement: Replace every customer name with the approved account alias before writing the report.
constraints.sourceText: Replace every customer name with the approved account alias before writing the report

constraints.statement: Sending any email requires explicit human approval before execution.
constraints.sourceText: Sending email requires explicit human approval

constraints.statement: All personal identifiers and compensation data must be redacted from the external report.
constraints.sourceText: External reports must exclude compensation and personal identifiers
